title: convolvulus capripes
intro: Convolvulus capripes, also known as the goatweed, is a type of flowering plant in the morning glory family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus capripes include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Convolvulus capripes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
